title: Episode 1
overview: As Shuichi urges Kirie to escape the town with him, the real "spiral" horror begins.

title: Episode 2
overview: Hair twisting, bodies intertwining, spirals are developing all over the town.

title: Episode 3
overview: Kurouzu Hospital is in an uproar. Blood thirsty pregnant women and creepy babies are surrounding Kirie, and her life is in danger.

title: Episode 4
overview: The curse of the spirals is destroying the town and taking peoples' minds with it. The chaos reaches a fever pitch.
